title: alliaria fraterna
intro: Alliaria fraterna, also known as Wild Garlic or Creeping Cress, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Alliaria fraterna include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Alliaria fraterna can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to treat various health issues, including colds, coughs, and digestive problems.
